positive: A whimsical, stylized illustration of a forest of glowing, oversized mushrooms and delicate bioluminescent flora, set at twilight. The main subject is a charming, abstract silhouette of a fox leaping over a root, positioned centrally. Utilize a high-contrast color palette dominated by deep midnight blues, ethereal teals, warm amber glows, and touches of electric lavender. The style should be sophisticated modern graphic design, resembling linocut or woodblock printing, with clean, bold lines and strong negative space. The lighting should emanate softly from the flora, creating deep shadows and dramatic highlights, perfect for a repeatable, wearable tapestry design. Composition must be symmetrical or radially balanced, highly detailed but non-cluttered.
